analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒呈現出來回波動，半導體行業在前一交易日的暴跌後恢復，多支股票因此上漲。微軟與英國國家健康服務合作推動醫療AI應用，將在500,000名醫護人員中推廣微軟365 Copilot。美國立法者要求加強對供應中國企業海外子公司的晶片製造商的規範。能源經濟學家指出，如果伊朗戰爭持續下去，油價可能會再次上漲至每桶$150。

【結語】
散戶投資人務必注意市場情緒的變化，並且保持冷靜。不要被短期波動所影響，應該根據長期投資策略進行投資。另外，投資者應該注意公司的財務報表和基本面，避免忽略潜在風險。

【精選個股】
1. WDC - 西數電子 - 半導體行業在前一交易日的暴跌後恢復，多支股票因此上漲。
2. NVDA - NVIDIA - 美國股市大幅下滑，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌。
3. DELL - 戴爾 - Dell董事 Egon Durban 相關的Silver Lake 賣出 234,978 股股票，可能是為了籌措資金或調整投資組合。
風險提醒：投資者應該注意公司的財務報表和基本面，避免忽略潜在風險。

items.title: Western Digital, Microchip Technology, and Seagate Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
items.summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the broader semiconductor sector recovered from a sharp selloff during the previous trading session.
items.zh_title: Western Digital、Microchip Technology 和 Seagate 股票大幅上漲，了解背後原因
items.zh_point: 西數電子、Microchip Technology 和 Seagate 股票在下午交易會議中大幅上漲，原因是半導體行業在前一交易日的暴跌後恢復。

items.title: Nova, Penguin Solutions, and Impinj Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
items.summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the broader semiconductor sector recovered from a sharp selloff during the previous trading session.
items.zh_title: Nova、企鵝解決方案和Impinj股票上漲，了解背後原因
items.zh_point: 在前一交易日大幅下挫的半導體行業在下午交易時段恢復，多支股票因此上漲。

items.title: Microsoft NHS Copilot Deal Tests Real World Healthcare AI Adoption
items.summary: Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) has secured a landmark agreement with NHS England for Microsoft 365 Copilot. The rollout will cover 505,000 clinicians and support staff across the NHS England workforce. The deployment includes Copilot Studio and agent governance tools for AI-powered productivity in a regulated healthcare setting. This NHS England deal positions Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) at the center of one of the largest real world deployments of generative AI in healthcare. For investors...
items.zh_title: 微軟與英國國家健康服務合作推動醫療AI應用
items.zh_point: 微軟與英國國家健康服務合作推動醫療AI應用，將在500,000名醫護人員中推廣微軟365 Copilot，旨在提高醫療效率並落實AI在醫療環境中的監管。

items.title: US lawmakers urge tighter rules on contract chipmakers supplying Chinese firms' overseas units
items.summary: A bipartisan pair of U.S. senators on Monday urged President Donald Trump's administration to tighten ‌rules on chip contract manufacturers such as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co to ‌prevent them from making advanced AI chips for overseas subsidiaries of Chinese companies.  This comes after ​the Trump administration last week moved to halt a potential loophole that may have led companies to export advanced chips such as those made by Nvidia to subsidiaries of Chinese companies located outside China.  The Bureau of ⁠Industry and Security (BIS), the arm of the U.S. Commerce Department tha
items.zh_title: 美國立法者要求加強對供應中國海外子公司晶片製造商的規範
items.zh_point: 美國兩名參議員要求政府加強對晶片合約製造商的規範，防止他們為中國公司海外子公司生產先進AI晶片。

items.title: MACOM, IPG Photonics, and Qorvo Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
items.summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session as the broader semiconductor sector recovered from a sharp selloff during the previous trading session.
items.zh_title: MACOM、IPG Photonics 和 Qorvo 股票上漲，需要知道什麼？
items.zh_point: 多家半導體股在下午交易時段大幅上漲，反彈前一交易日大幅下挫的市場情緒。

items.title: Oil prices may hit $150 per barrel soon if Iran war continues, energy economist says
items.zh_title: 伊朗戰爭持續，油價可能再次衝上$150每桶
items.zh_point: 能源經濟學家指出，如果伊朗戰爭持續下去，油價可能會再次上漲至每桶$150。

items.title: Trump booed at Madison Square Garden before Knicks-Spurs NBA finals game
items.summary: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
items.zh_title: 特朗普在紐約 Knicks 賽前遭到觀眾唾罵
items.zh_point: 特朗普出席 Knicks 和 Spurs 的 NBA 總決賽第三場比賽，卻遭到 Knicks 球迷的唾罵，他們擔心特朗普的出席可能會影響 Knicks 的勝利。

items.title: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
items.summary: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.
items.zh_title: 五角大樓擴大中國軍方相關企業名單，包括阿里巴巴和百度等
items.zh_point: 五角大樓在最新一波針對中美關係的緊張局勢中，將阿里巴巴和百度等企業加入軍方相關企業名單，對中美關係的和解進程造成了新的打擊。

items.title: Asia chip-linked shares recover after U.S. peers bounce back
items.summary: In the U.S., chip stocks powered gains on Monday, helping the S&P 500 gain 0.3%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite advanced 0.86%.
items.zh_title: 亞洲晶片相關股價回升 美股同業反彈
items.zh_point: 美國晶片股在週一大幅上漲，帶動標準普爾500指數上漲0.3%，科技重磅指數納斯達克指數則上漲0.86%。

items.title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.
items.zh_title: 不論對Anthropic或OpenAI發生什麼事，Perplexity CEO仍計劃2028年上市
items.zh_point: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas表示，公司將於2028年不論對Anthropic或OpenAI發生什麼事都會進行上市，隨著AI巨頭Anthropic已經私下申請上市。

items.title: Your tech portfolio could be on the wrong side of the AI boom
items.summary: Why the coming $1,000 videogame console will squeeze hardware stocks.
items.zh_title: 你的科技投資組合可能正被 AI 泡沫錯過
items.zh_point: 未來的 $1,000 電玩主機將會壓縮硬體股價。這可能與 AI 泡沫有關，投資者需要重新評估投資組合，以避免錯過趨勢。

items.title: BofA sees ‘red flags’ in the U.S. stock market. Here’s what to buy now.
items.summary: Most investors who pile into the S&P 500 in 2026 think they own the entire stock market. What they actually own is nothing more than a heavy bet on Big Tech — and right now, that bet has run its course.
items.zh_title: 美銀見到美國股市的「紅旗」，這是現在該買的股票
items.zh_point: 美銀銀行認為美國股市出現了警訊，投資者應該轉向買入其他股票，以避免過度依賴科技股。

items.title: Elon Musk says SpaceX doesn’t need ‘magic’ to put AI data centers up in space
items.summary: Critics say that setting up orbital data centers is easier said than done. But Musk argues that it’s not a “super hard problem” to solve.
items.zh_title: Elon Musk 表示 SpaceX 不需要「魔法」來在太空建置 AI 資料中心
items.zh_point: Elon Musk 表示太空資料中心不是難以克服的挑戰，他認為這不是一個「超級困難的問題」。

items.title: Knicks ticket prices plunge more than 50% ahead of Game 3 at MSG — but not just because Trump’s going
items.summary: Ticketing-industry pros say there’s a bigger driver behind some ticket prices dropping several thousand dollars.
items.zh_title: 紐約尼克斯門票價格暴跌超過 50% 等待 Game 3 的時候，但不是因為川普要來
items.zh_point: 市場專家指出，門票價格暴跌的主因並非川普的出席，而是其他更重要的因素。

items.title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO — but there’s a catch
items.summary: “It may be a while because there are things we want to do that are likely easier as a private company,” OpenAI says.
items.zh_title: OpenAI 提出保密IPO申請 — 但有個伏筆
items.zh_point: OpenAI 表示，公司可能會選擇留在私人公司狀態，因為某些事情在私人公司下更容易實現。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大跌，AI產業領域全面下滑受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下滑，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價下跌超過10%，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: Comex金、銀結束低檔
items.zh_point: Comex金價下跌1.4%，連續兩個交易日下跌；Comex銀價下跌2.5%，連續三個交易日下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國深度探索 AI 的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業聲稱已經訓練出高表現的 AI 模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價大幅下跌的恐慌情緒被認為過度。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信業新聞回顧：市場話題
items.zh_point: 深入探討DeepSeek、SoFi等科技、媒體和電信相關的市場發展和趨勢。

items.title: Janus Henderson Opportunistic Alpha Managed Account Q1 2026 Portfolio Review

items.zh_point: Janus Henderson 進行 Q1 2026 投資組合回顧，評估適時機遇 Alpha 管理帳戶的投資策略和績效。

items.title: Astera Labs: Take Some Chips Off The Table (Rating Downgrade)
items.zh_title: Astera Labs：把一些晶片拿下桌子（評級下調）
items.zh_point: Astera Labs 因評級下調而受到影響，投資者應考慮減少對公司的投資。

items.title: Janus Henderson Opportunistic Alpha Managed Account Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: Janus Henderson 機會主義 Alpha 管理帳戶 2026 年第一季度評論

items.title: Gencor: Solid Balance Sheet, But The Overall Investment Case Has Holes

items.zh_point: Gencor的財務報表表現良好，但投資者需要仔細評估公司的整體投資案例，以避免忽略潜在風險。

items.title: Databricks in talks to raise funds at over $165 billion, The Information reports
items.zh_title: Databricks 正在洽談超過 1650 億美元的融資，The Information 報導
items.zh_point: Databricks 正在與投資者洽談融資，預計融資額超過 1650 億美元，顯示公司的市場估值持續上升。

items.title: US lawmakers urge tighter rules on contract chipmakers supplying Chinese firms’ overseas units
items.zh_title: 美國立法者要求對供應中國企業海外子公司的合約晶片製造商加強規範
items.zh_point: 美國立法者呼籲加強對供應中國企業海外子公司的晶片製造商的規範，以防止敏感技術被泄露。

items.title: Storm pounds New Zealand’s capital city, cancelling flights and ferries
items.zh_title: 暴風雨襲擊紐西蘭首都，取消航班和渡輪
items.zh_point: 紐西蘭首都遭遇嚴重暴風雨，導致航班和渡輪服務暫停，影響當地交通和生活。

items.title: Dell director Egon Durban-affiliated Silver Lake sells $234,978 in shares
items.zh_title: Dell董事 Egon Durban 相關的 Silver Lake 賣出 234,978 股股票
items.zh_point: Dell 董事 Egon Durban 相關的投資公司 Silver Lake 賣出了超過 234,978 股股票，可能是為了籌措資金或調整投資組合。

items.title: Egon Durban-affiliated Silver Lake entities sell $276k Dell stock
items.zh_title: Egon Durban相關的Silver Lake實體出售276萬美元的Dell股票
items.zh_point: Egon Durban與Silver Lake相關的實體出售Dell股票，交易總額達276萬美元。
